Who I am

10 years of Pilates. Then I laced up.
That's how this program was born.

I've been practicing and teaching Pilates for over 10 years. One day it clicked: these two disciplines were made for each other. Pilates strengthens what running breaks down and keeps injuries away. Running forges my mental strength.

RUN SCULPT PERFORM is the method born from my passion for Pilates and running. The one I use myself, the one that got me through the marathon, and the one I co-created with 500+ of you.

— Alice

Move with purpose →
Designed with experts

Co-created with 500+ runners.
Built with two experts.

01

500+ runners surveyed

Co-creation

This program was shaped by your answers. 198 runners shared their goals, their struggles, and what they needed. Every track, every week was built from that.

02

Joseph Fanhert

Certified sports coach — Running, Triathlon, Physical preparation

Joseph designed and validated every running plan in the program — intervals, tempo, long runs, all three tracks.

03

Aurélie Canzoneri

Certified naturopath FÉNA — Stanford Continuing Studies, Nutrition Science — Published author

Aurélie created the nutrition track: 30+ recipes and a mindset guide calibrated for female runners.

Everything's included

One program. A clear structure
to reach your goals.

Daily training app

Morning check-in, progress dashboard, pace simulator — everything in one app.

Week-by-week running plan

3 adapted tracks: Road to 10K, Run to 21K, or Just Run & Pilates. 10 weeks of progression.

29 integrated Pilates classes

29 classes linked to the running plan + 15 stretching classes: prevention, performance, active recovery.

100-page ebook — Nutrition & Mindset

30+ recipes by Aurélie Canzoneri. Mental preparation, visualization, neuroscience.

Private community + tracking tools

Private channel between runners, training journal, synced .ics calendar, Spotify playlists.

Three tracks, one program

Choose your starting line.
We'll handle the road.

01

Just Run & Pilates

Goal: Run better, no distance pressure

  • Run when you want, how you want
  • Pilates adapted to your running practice
  • Running as a lifestyle, not a competition

For you if you already run and want a smarter Pilates × Running routine.

02

Road to 10K

Goal: 0 → 10 km

  • Progressive walk/run intervals
  • Pilates focused on pelvic stability
  • Your first 10K in 10 weeks

For you if you can't yet run 30 minutes straight today.

03

Run to 21K

Goal: 10 km → Half-marathon

  • Progressive interval and tempo sessions
  • Performance Pilates + injury prevention
  • Your half-marathon in 10 weeks

For you if you already run 10K and want to go further.

Frequently asked questions

Something not covered here? Send us a message on Instagram @lestudiobyalice — we love hearing from you.

Injury was the #1 frustration in our survey — 31% of runners told us pain holds them back. That's exactly why the entire program is built on a Pilates foundation. Every week pairs your running sessions with targeted Pilates that strengthens what running breaks down: hips, core, hamstrings, ankles. If something already hurts when you run, this is where it gets fixed.
72% of the runners who answered our survey run regularly — and their top frustrations were stagnation and lack of structure. Running by feel only gets you so far. This program replaces guesswork with a week-by-week plan: what to run, when to do Pilates, when to rest. The structure is the product.
55% of respondents ranked injury prevention as their #1 reason for combining Pilates and running. It's not a trend — it's biomechanics. Pilates builds the stabilizers that running alone ignores. Core that holds your posture at km 15. Hips that absorb impact without breaking down. Every session in the program is designed by a certified coach to directly support your running performance.
This doesn't add to your routine — it replaces it. The weekly plan integrates running and Pilates into one schedule: 3 running sessions (30-60 min) + 3 Pilates classes (30-45 min). Sunday is rest. The app tells you what to do each morning. No thinking, no planning. It's built for busy weeks.
20% of surveyed runners said motivation and consistency were their main struggle. Generic plans fail because they give you content without structure. This program was co-created with 500+ runners who shared that exact problem. Three tracks, daily guidance in the app, progressive difficulty, and a private community of runners who hold you accountable — you don't decide what to do, you just show up.
The program includes a full running plan designed by a certified coach, 10 weeks of Pilates classes, 30+ nutrition recipes from a certified naturopath, and daily guidance through the app. That's less than a single session with a running coach. The early bird price of €97 is available until April 25 — after that, it goes back to €297.

10 weeks to become
the runner you already are.

The structure. The experts. The community. Everything is ready — all that's missing is you.
